items.raw_excerpt: If you've spent more than a week in most places in Norway, you've likely come across the fact that it's very hard to find an open store on Sunday. Why is that so?
items.summary_en: In Norway, nearly all shops and stores are closed on Sundays. This is due to old laws that protect family time and rest. Visitors often find it surprising when they cannot shop on weekends.
items.summary_ko: 노르웨이에서는 거의 모든 상점이 일요일에 문을 닫습니다. 이는 가족 시간과 휴식을 보호하기 위해 만들어진 오래된 법률 때문입니다. 주말에 쇼핑을 할 수 없다는 사실을 발견하는 관광객들은 종종 놀라게 됩니다.
items.title_en: Why is everything in Norway closed on Sundays?
items.title_ko: 노르웨이에서는 왜 일요일에 모든 가게가 문을 닫을까요?
items.title_original: Why is everything in Norway closed on Sundays?

items.raw_excerpt: It's a well-known fact that a combination of very hot weather and heavy traffic can increase local temperatures. Now a Geneva politician has a plan to bring relief from both heat and road congestion to Switzerland’s second-largest city.
items.summary_en: A Swiss politician wants to reduce traffic in Geneva during extreme heat. More cars on the road raise local temperatures. She proposes changing traffic patterns to cool the city.
items.summary_ko: 스위스 제네바의 한 의원이 폭염 기간 차량 통행을 줄이기 위한 교통 패턴 변경을 추진하고 있다. 도심 내 과도한 차량은 주변 온도를 높인다고 지적하며, 도시 열 완화 대책으로 도심 교통 규칙 개정을 제안했다.
items.title_en: Swiss MP wants to change traffic rules during heatwaves
items.title_ko: 스위스 의원, 폭염 시 교통 흐름 개정 추진
items.title_original: Swiss MP seeks to change traffic patterns during heatwaves

items.raw_excerpt: Reporting a nuisance call might feel pointless, but in Austria, it isn't. We spoke to a scam-prevention expert about where to report, what details matter and when to skip the regulator entirely.
items.summary_en: Many people in Austria receive unwanted cold calls and scam phone numbers. A scam-prevention expert explains where to report nuisance calls and what details matter. Reporting these calls can actually help stop them.
items.summary_ko: 오스트리아에서는 원하지 않는 판매 전화나 사기 전화를 받는 사람이 많습니다. 사기 예방 전문가가 불필요한 전화를 어디에 신고하고 어떤 정보가 중요한지 설명합니다. 이러한 신고는 실제로 전화를 줄이는 데 도움이 됩니다.
items.title_en: How to Stop Cold Calls in Austria
items.title_ko: 오스트리아에서 원치 않는 전화를 막는 방법
items.title_original: EXPLAINED: How to stop cold calls in Austria

items.raw_excerpt: Due to rising costs and regulatory pressure, this year’s Amsterdam Kwaku Summer Festival will be the last in its current form, its organizers have said. “Kwaku is more than a festival – it is a unique social phenomenon that has traditionally meant a great deal to many people,” the organisation said in a press release, describing the move as a difficult decision. “Stricter permit conditions, rising costs and increasing organisational complexity make it increasingly difficult to keep the festival
items.summary_en: Amsterdam's Kwaku Summer Festival will end in its current form due to rising costs and new rules. The organizers said this was a difficult decision. Higher costs and stricter permits make it hard to keep the festival going.
items.summary_ko: 상승하는 비용과 규제 압박으로 암스테르담 콩쿠르 여름 축제가 변화합니다. 주최측은 올해 축제가 현재 형태의 마지막이 될 것이라고 발표했습니다. 더 엄격한 허가 조건과 비용 증가로 축제 유지가 어려워지고 있습니다.
items.title_en: Amsterdam Kwaku festival to change due to rising costs
items.title_ko: 암스테르담 콩쿠르 축제, 비용 상승으로 변화
items.title_original: Rising costs force Amsterdam’s Kwaku festival to change
